<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--INIT-->
  <Command Name="init" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Init.InitCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Init.InitCommand+InitArgs">
    <Description>Create a new Ivy project.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="claude" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Install Claude Code MCP integration after project 
creation.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="cursor" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Install Cursor MCP integration after project 
creation.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="dangerous-clear" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Clear the current folder before creating the new 
project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="dangerous-overwrite" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Clear the current folder before creating the new 
project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="hello,helloworld" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Include a simple demo app in the new project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="ignore-git" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Skip Git checks and commit</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="n" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The namespace for the new Ivy project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="prerelease" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Include prerelease versions when fetching the latest Ivy 
version.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="script" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Create a simple Ivy script file instead of a full 
project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="select-template" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Interactively select a template from available 
options.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="t" Long="template" Value="TEMPLATE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Use a specific template for the new project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="yes-to-all" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Skip all prompts and use default values</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--CONNECT-->
  <Command Name="connect" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">

ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Connect.ConnectAddCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Connect.ConnectAddCommand+ConnectAddSettings">
      <Description>Add an Ivy connection</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--ADD-->
    <Command Name="add" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Connect.ConnectAddCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Connect.ConnectAddCommand+ConnectAddSettings">
      <Description>Add an Ivy connection</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--REMOVE-->
    <Command Name="remove" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Connect.ConnectRemoveCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Connect.ConnectRemoveCommand+ConnectRemoveSetting
s">

      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="n" Long="connection-name" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
        <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean" />
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>

        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--DB-->
    <Command Name="db" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">

      <Command Name="__default_command" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Db.DbAddCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Db.DbAddCommand+DbAddArgs">
        <Description>Add a database provider to your Ivy project.</Description>
        <Parameters>
          <Option Short="" Long="connection-string" Value="CONNECTION_STRING" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
          <Option Short="" Long="ignore-git" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Skip Git checks and commit</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="CONNECTION_NAME" Required="false"
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
          <Option Short="p" Long="provider" Value="PROVIDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[Ivy.Internals.Connections.Db.Generators.DbContextGen

PublicKeyToken=null]]" />
          <Option Short="" Long="schema" Value="SCHEMA" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
          <Option Short="" Long="use-default-schema" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Use the database's default schema instead of

          </Option>
          <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="yes-to-all" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Skip all prompts and use default values</Description>
          </Option>
        </Parameters>
      </Command>
      <!--ADD-->
      <Command Name="add" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Db.DbAddCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Db.DbAddCommand+DbAddArgs">
        <Description>Add a database provider to your Ivy project.</Description>
        <Parameters>
          <Option Short="" Long="connection-string" Value="CONNECTION_STRING" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
          <Option Short="" Long="ignore-git" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Skip Git checks and commit</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="CONNECTION_NAME" Required="false"
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
          <Option Short="p" Long="provider" Value="PROVIDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[Ivy.Internals.Connections.Db.Generators.DbContextGen
erators, Ivy.Internals, Version=1.2.23.0, Culture=neutral, 
PublicKeyToken=null]]" />
          <Option Short="" Long="schema" Value="SCHEMA" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
          <Option Short="" Long="use-default-schema" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Use the database's default schema instead of 
prompting</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
          </Option>
          <Option Short="" Long="yes-to-all" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Skip all prompts and use default values</Description>
          </Option>
        </Parameters>
      </Command>
    </Command>
    <!--OPENAPI-->

          <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
            <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>

  <!--AUTH-->

Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Skip Git checks and commit</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="provider" Value="PROVIDER" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[Ivy.Internals.Auth.Models.AuthProviders, 
Ivy.Internals, Version=1.2.23.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null]]" />

        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--APP-->
  <Command Name="app" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Create or modify an Ivy app using the Ivy agent</Description>
    <!--CREATE-->
    <Command Name="create" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.App.AppCreateCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.App.AppCreateCommand+AppCreateArgs">
      <Description>Create a new Ivy app using the Ivy agent</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Argument Name="projectPath" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the project</Description>
        </Argument>
        <Option Short="" Long="connection" Value="CONNECTION_NAME" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
        <Option Short="" Long="entity" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Connection entity to create app from</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="from-entities,from-entity" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Select entities to create app from</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="group" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
        <Option Short="" Long="icon" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String" />
        <Option Short="" Long="ignore-git" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Skip Git checks and commit</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="prompt" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Prompt for the agent</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="timeout" Value="SECONDS" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
          <Description>Timeout in seconds (default: 360)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--REMOVE-->
    <Command Name="remove" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.App.AppRemoveCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.App.AppRemoveCommand+AppRemoveArgs">
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="all" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Remove all apps</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Name of the app to remove</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--WIDGET-->
  <Command Name="widget" IsBranch="true"

    <Description>Create and manage Ivy external widgets</Description>
    <!--__DEFAULT_COMMAND-->
    <Command Name="__default_command" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Widget.WidgetInitCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Widget.WidgetInitCommand+WidgetInitArgs">
      <Description>Initialize a new Ivy external widget project.</Description>
      <Parameters>

          <Description>The namespace for the widget project.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false"

          <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="w" Long="widget" Value="WIDGET" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The name of the widget to create.</Description>

        <Option Short="" Long="yes-to-all" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Skip all prompts and use default values</Description>

    <!--INIT-->
    <Command Name="init" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.Widget.WidgetInitCommand" 
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.Widget.WidgetInitCommand+WidgetInitArgs">
      <Description>Initialize a new Ivy external widget project.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="n" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The namespace for the widget project.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">

        </Option>

        <Option Short="" Long="yes-to-all" Value="NULL" Required="false"

    </Command>

      <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"

    </Parameters>
  </Command>

    <!--__DEFAULT_COMMAND-->

  <!--RUN-->
  <Command Name="run" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Ivy.Console.Commands.RunCommand"
Settings="Ivy.Console.Commands.RunCommand+RunArgs">
    <Description>Run Ivy project with hot reload</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="args" Position="0" Required="false" Kind="vector" 
ClrType="System.String[]">
        <Description>Arguments to pass to the Ivy application</Description>
      </Argument>
      <Option Short="" Long="app" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Specify which app to run in a multi-app 
project</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="browse" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Open browser automatically when the application 
starts</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="describe" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show detailed information about the 
application</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="find-available-port" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Automatically find an available port if the specified port 
is in use</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="i-kill-for-this-port" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Kill any process using the specified port before 
starting</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="port" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[System.Int32, System.Private.CoreLib, 
Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]">
        <Description>Port to run the Ivy application on (default: 
5010)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Enable verbose logging</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="watch-verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Enable verbose output for watcher</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
